title: Implement BulletSnapshot state read/write API (getState/setState) + error handling

reference_files.reason: BulletSnapshot state API - generic getState/setState methods
Error handling - zero value + WARN for unregistered/type mismatch
per-bullet state semantics - working memory, not frozen params, mutable during flight

acceptance_criteria: BulletSnapshot.getState(ResourceLocation stateId) generic method returns typed value (casts based on registry value_type)
BulletSnapshot.setState(ResourceLocation stateId, Object value) generic method writes to state map
Unregistered state ID: getState returns null (or zero value for primitives), WARN logged per-state per-minute
Type mismatch: getState returns null/zero value, WARN logged per-state per-minute
Only states registered with domain=BULLET are accessible (domain mismatch WARN)
State map is mutable at runtime (hooks can call setState during onTick/onHit/etc.)
No exceptions thrown for unregistered/mismatch (graceful degradation only)
deliverables: src/main/java/org/yanbwe/modularshoot/bullet/BulletSnapshot.java (updated: add getState/setState methods with error handling)
